title: LegalMarketProfile
description: Composable market-level declaration of mandated, default-on, eligible, and excluded packs with readiness dimension snapshots. Operationalizes legal-market-composition-and-effective-configuration-resolver-spec.md §5. Reifies the informal 'country pack' concept into a governed, composable structure.

legalMarketId.description: Unique identifier. ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 for country-level (e.g. PH, US, KR) or qualified for sub-jurisdictional (e.g. US-VA).

version.description: Semver version. Patch = snapshot updates. Minor = eligible pack additions. Major = mandated pack changes.

mandatedPacks.description: Packs required for this market. Non-deactivatable. Per pack-and-adapter §9: regulatory and national-standards are always mandated.

defaultOnPacks.description: Packs activated by default but deactivatable within entitlement.

eligiblePacks.description: Packs available for activation but not activated by default.

excludedPacks.description: Packs explicitly ineligible for this market.

readinessDimensions.description: Market readiness across the 8 dimensions from country-payer-readiness §7.2.

launchTier.description: Current launch tier per country-payer-readiness §12. Output of dimensional readiness, not an independent assertion.

standards.description: Regulatory and standards metadata specific to this market.

packFamilyEnum.description: The 7 focused pack families from pack-and-adapter §6.

launchTierEnum.description: Launch tiers per country-payer-readiness §12. T0=Exploratory, T1=Limited pilot, T2=Controlled availability, T3=General availability.

mandatedPackEntry.description: A pack mandated for this market. Non-deactivatable.

packId.description: Reference to a pack in the pack registry.

packFamily.description: Expected: regulatory or national-standards for mandated packs.

rationale.description: Why this pack is mandated for this market.

minimumPackState.description: Minimum lifecycle state for this mandate to be actionable.

defaultOnPackEntry.description: A pack activated by default but deactivatable within entitlement.

packId.description: Reference to a pack in the pack registry.

packFamily.description: Expected: locale, language, or payer for default-on packs.

deactivationConstraints.description: Conditions under which deactivation is blocked. Empty = freely deactivatable.

eligiblePackEntry.description: A pack available for activation but not activated by default.

packId.description: Reference to a pack in the pack registry.

eligibilityConditions.description: Conditions for this pack to be activatable for a specific tenant scope.

excludedPackEntry.description: A pack explicitly ineligible for this market.

exclusionRationale.description: Why this pack is ineligible for this market.

readinessDimensionEntry.description: Point-in-time readiness for one of the 8 market-readiness dimensions.

state.description: Current readiness state for this dimension.

evidenceRef.description: Pointer to evidence artifact(s) in artifacts/. Empty string if no evidence.

scopeBounds.description: What scope this readiness was verified against (e.g. 'pilot-only', 'single-payer').

standardsMetadata.description: Regulatory and standards metadata for this market.

complianceFrameworks.description: Compliance framework identifiers relevant to this market.
